description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is predominantly smooth and light-colored, with clean lines and a boxy form. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, palm trees, and a circular outdoor structure, likely a water tank or garden feature. The front entryway is defined by a wide, flat driveway and a covered porch area. The landscaping is sparse but intentional, with palm trees strategically placed around the perimeter.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a backyard pool surrounded by palm trees. The design is minimalist with clean lines and a light exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, driveway, and partial view of the backyard pool and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, asymmetrical window placement, and the circular outdoor structure in the backyard.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the backyard, pool area, and the circular structure, with the house's boxy form visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showcasing the pool, patio area, and landscaping with palm trees, as well as the back facade of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, flat driveway leading to a covered porch with a minimalist door and no visible decorative columns
